kennelTipLean.note: The Kennel is in full meltdown mode after the Dolphins shellacking. Nobody's tipping the Dogs — they're tipping how many tries Nikora scores.

kennelTipQuotes.thread: THE TRUTH Why We Are DOG SHIT
kennelTipQuotes.quote: Another 5 year rebuild coming... if Gus doesn't have the balls to rip into Baz at the end of the year he's just as cooked as the coach is

trivia.question: What year did the Bulldogs win their most recent NRL premiership?
trivia.explainer: Steve Folkes' Dogs beat the Roosters 16-13 in the 2004 grand final — the club's last premiership. Feels like a lifetime ago right now.

recap.question: Who scored the Bulldogs' opening try against the Dolphins?
recap.explainer: Salmon crossed in the 8th minute for the Dogs' first — one of only two tries they managed all night.

washup.headline: 12-44 at Suncorp. We got absolutely cooked.
washup.vibe: Forty missed tackles, ten errors, and Isaako put 4 line breaks through us like we weren't there. Tracey was invisible at the back, the middle got smoked, and the only Dog who turned up was Tupouniua with 42 tackles trying to plug a leaking dam. Sitting 13th after ten rounds and now we get the Sharks at Suncorp again. It's bleak.
washup.kennelSummary: The Kennel is at full DEFCON 1. Tracey's getting buried, Salmon at 13 is being treated as a personal insult, and the Gus/Ciro/Barrett discourse has consumed every thread. Nate DAWG called the 4-hour-15-minute window to meltdown before kickoff and was bang on.

kennelHotTakes.quote: That's the most pathetic fullback performance I've ever seen from a Bulldogs fullback. Send him to the Super League — swap him for Jai Field, we need speed.
kennelHotTakes.author: Imposter404 / Kempsey Dog

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Tracey?Time to go
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: Imposter404 calling it 'the most pathetic fullback performance' he's seen in blue and white. Loud calls to shift Crichton to fullback and bury Tracey in reserve grade.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Is Gus actually the real problem?
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: 342 replies of Gus discourse. Glenn L reckons what Gus does in the next few days defines his legacy. silva's blaming Barrett for being 'too nice' to the players.
